---
title: "phase 1 task 1,2,5,6"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-11"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

#task 2 VB
library(ggplot2)

vb <- read.csv("ECN_VB1.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

ggplot(vb, aes(x = factor(SYEAR))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "Baseline vegetation: sampling over time",
       x = "Year",
       y = "Number of observations") +
  theme_minimal()
#task 2 VF
library(ggplot2)

fg <- read.csv("ECN_VF1.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

ggplot(fg, aes(x = factor(SYEAR))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "darkgreen") +
  labs(title = "Fine-grain vegetation: sampling over time",
       x = "Year",
       y = "Number of observations") +
  theme_minimal()
#task 2 VW
library(ggplot2)

wd <- read.csv("ECN_VW1.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

ggplot(wd, aes(x = factor(SYEAR))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "forestgreen") +
  labs(title = "Woodland vegetation: sampling over time",
       x = "Year",
       y = "Number of observations") +
  theme_minimal()
#task 2 IB
library(ggplot2)

ib <- read.csv("ECN_IB1.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

ib$YEAR2 <- substr(ib$SDATE, nchar(ib$SDATE)-1, nchar(ib$SDATE))
ib$YEAR <- ifelse(as.numeric(ib$YEAR2) > 50,
                  1900 + as.numeric(ib$YEAR2),
                  2000 + as.numeric(ib$YEAR2))

ggplot(ib, aes(x = factor(YEAR))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "orange") +
  labs(title = "Butterflies: sampling over time",
       x = "Year",
       y = "Number of observations") +
  theme_minimal()
#task 2 IM
library(ggplot2)

im <- read.csv("ECN_IM1.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

im$YEAR2 <- substr(im$SDATE, nchar(im$SDATE)-1, nchar(im$SDATE))
im$YEAR <- ifelse(as.numeric(im$YEAR2) > 50,
                  1900 + as.numeric(im$YEAR2),
                  2000 + as.numeric(im$YEAR2))

ggplot(im, aes(x = factor(YEAR))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "purple") +
  labs(title = "Moths: sampling over time",
       x = "Year",
       y = "Number of observations") +
  theme_minimal()
#task 5
fg <- read.csv("ECN_VF1.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
wd <- read.csv("ECN_VW1.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
bl <- read.csv("ECN_VB1.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

fg$VALUE <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(fg$VALUE))
wd$VALUE <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(wd$VALUE))
bl$VALUE <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(bl$VALUE))

fg$YEAR <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(fg$SYEAR))
wd$YEAR <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(wd$SYEAR))
bl$YEAR <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(bl$SYEAR))

fg <- fg[!is.na(fg$VALUE) & !is.na(fg$YEAR), ]
wd <- wd[!is.na(wd$VALUE) & !is.na(wd$YEAR), ]
bl <- bl[!is.na(bl$VALUE) & !is.na(bl$YEAR), ]

common_years <- Reduce(intersect, list(unique(fg$YEAR),
                                       unique(wd$YEAR),
                                       unique(bl$YEAR)))

fg_sub <- fg[fg$YEAR %in% common_years, ]
wd_sub <- wd[wd$YEAR %in% common_years, ]
bl_sub <- bl[bl$YEAR %in% common_years, ]

fg_log <- log1p(fg_sub$VALUE)
wd_log <- log1p(wd_sub$VALUE)
bl_log <- log1p(bl_sub$VALUE)

fg_log <- fg_log[is.finite(fg_log)]
wd_log <- wd_log[is.finite(wd_log)]
bl_log <- bl_log[is.finite(bl_log)]

d_fg <- density(fg_log)
d_wd <- density(wd_log)
d_bl <- density(bl_log)

par(mar = c(5.2, 5.2, 4.2, 2.2))

plot(d_fg,
     col = "darkgreen",
     lwd = 2,
     main = "Vegetation comparison (log scale)",
     xlab = "log(VALUE + 1)",
     ylab = "Density",
     xlim = c(0, 9.4),
     ylim = c(0, 0.48),
     cex.main = 1.5,
     cex.lab = 1.3,
     cex.axis = 1.1)

lines(d_wd, col = "brown", lwd = 2)
lines(d_bl, col = "blue", lwd = 2)

legend("topright",
       legend = c("Fine–grain", "Woodland", "Baseline"),
       col = c("darkgreen", "brown", "blue"),
       lwd = 2,
       bty = "o",
       cex = 1.2)
#task 6
bf <- read.csv("ECN_IB1.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
mt <- read.csv("ECN_IM1.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

bf$VALUE <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(bf$VALUE))
mt$VALUE <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(mt$VALUE))

bf <- bf[!is.na(bf$VALUE), ]
mt <- mt[!is.na(mt$VALUE), ]

bf <- bf[bf$FIELDNAME != "XX", ]

mt <- mt[!grepl("^Q", mt$FIELDNAME) & mt$FIELDNAME != "XX", ]

bf$DATE <- as.Date(bf$SDATE, format = "%d-%b-%y")
mt$DATE <- as.Date(mt$SDATE, format = "%d-%b-%y")

bf$YEAR  <- as.numeric(format(bf$DATE, "%Y"))
bf$MONTH <- as.numeric(format(bf$DATE, "%m"))

mt$YEAR  <- as.numeric(format(mt$DATE, "%Y"))
mt$MONTH <- as.numeric(format(mt$DATE, "%m"))

bf <- bf[!is.na(bf$YEAR) & !is.na(bf$MONTH), ]
mt <- mt[!is.na(mt$YEAR) & !is.na(mt$MONTH), ]

bf <- bf[bf$YEAR >= 2000 & bf$YEAR <= 2010, ]
mt <- mt[mt$YEAR >= 2000 & mt$YEAR <= 2010, ]

common_sites <- intersect(unique(bf$SITECODE), unique(mt$SITECODE))

bf <- bf[bf$SITECODE %in% common_sites, ]
mt <- mt[mt$SITECODE %in% common_sites, ]

bf <- bf[bf$MONTH >= 4 & bf$MONTH <= 9, ]
mt <- mt[mt$MONTH >= 4 & mt$MONTH <= 9, ]

bf_daily <- aggregate(VALUE ~ SITECODE + DATE + MONTH, data = bf, sum, na.rm = TRUE)
mt_daily <- aggregate(VALUE ~ SITECODE + DATE + MONTH, data = mt, sum, na.rm = TRUE)

bf_month <- aggregate(VALUE ~ MONTH, data = bf_daily, median, na.rm = TRUE)
mt_month <- aggregate(VALUE ~ MONTH, data = mt_daily, median, na.rm = TRUE)

all_months <- data.frame(MONTH = 4:9)
bf_month <- merge(all_months, bf_month, by = "MONTH", all.x = TRUE)
mt_month <- merge(all_months, mt_month, by = "MONTH", all.x = TRUE)

bf_month$NORM <- bf_month$VALUE / max(bf_month$VALUE, na.rm = TRUE)
mt_month$NORM <- mt_month$VALUE / max(mt_month$VALUE, na.rm = TRUE)

print(bf_month)
print(mt_month)

plot(bf_month$MONTH, bf_month$NORM,
     type = "o",
     pch = 16,
     lwd = 2,
     col = "steelblue",
     ylim = c(0.12, 1.05),
     xaxt = "n",
     xlab = "Month",
     ylab = "Median abundance (normalized to 1)",
     main = "Normalized seasonal profiles: butterflies vs moths")

axis(1, at = 4:9, labels = 4:9)

lines(mt_month$MONTH, mt_month$NORM,
      type = "o",
      pch = 16,
      lwd = 2,
      col = "darkorange")

legend("topleft",
       legend = c("Butterflies (IB)", "Moths (IM, Apr-Sep)"),
       col = c("steelblue", "darkorange"),
       lwd = 2,
       pch = 16,
       bty = "n")
